allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$files = @\(''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\WinCare.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\ui\\ProgressPanel.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\ui\\Dashboard.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\ui\\Theme.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\core\\UIBuilder.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\core\\Logger.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\core\\Config.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\modules\\01_WindowsMaintenance.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\modules\\02_WindowsUpdate.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\modules\\03_BugFixer_04_OfficeSuite.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\modules\\05_RegistryRepair_06_AppRemover.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\modules\\07_HealthCheck_08_ComponentTest.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\modules\\09_WingetManager.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\ui\\Settings.ps1'',''c:\\Users\\Cruz\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\WinCare-Pro\\ui\\LogViewer.ps1''\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $errors = $null; $content = Get-Content $f -Raw; [System.Management.Automation.PSParser]::Tokenize\($content, [ref]$errors\) | Out-Null; if \($errors.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Host \(''ERROR: '' + $f + '' \('' + $errors.Count + '' errors\)''\); $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \(''  Line '' + $_.Token.StartLine + '': '' + $_.Message\) } } else { Write-Host \(''OK: '' + $f\) } }")
